title: AIEOS CD spec v1
description: A frozen CD spec authored by the Release & Exposure kit. Models an environment DAG with typed promotion edges, per-environment action instances, and rollback conditions. v1 reserves extension points for v1.1 features (bake-time promotion policies, ephemeral environments, feature-flag exposure gating) as optional fields so the feature work does not force a breaking schema bump.

spec_version.description: Semantic version of this spec document.

artifact_ref.description: Reference to the CI-produced artifact (e.g., OCI image digest). The pipeline runner resolves this against the CI spec's published artifact at execution time.

environments.description: Environment nodes in the deployment graph. Each environment carries its own set of action instances (deploy.environment, verify.*).

promotions.description: Typed edges between environments. The graph implied by from/to must be a DAG.

rollback_conditions.description: Criteria that trigger deploy.rollback. Evaluated by the run validator against post-deploy verify.* evidence.

exposure_policy.description: Reserved for v1.1. Feature-flag-based exposure policy. v1 schema accepts the field but does not constrain its shape beyond type.

lifetime.description: Lifetime of the environment node. 'persistent' is the v1 default. 'pr-scope' is reserved for v1.1 ephemeral environments.

action.description: Taxonomy action identifier — must match an entry in taxonomy/actions-v1.md.

bake_duration.description: Reserved for v1.1. Seconds to wait before promoting; verification runs continuously during the bake. v1 schema accepts the field; the runner does not evaluate it.

verification_interval.description: Reserved for v1.1. Seconds between verify.* invocations during the bake window.

rollback_on_degradation.description: Reserved for v1.1. If true and bake-time verification regresses, trigger deploy.rollback instead of promoting.
